summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Stage 2 Cross-Review Deliberation feature. Pre-completed case 8df151be-181c-48bf-bee1-a412d9fecbf5 used. All 14 test items verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 test items verified. Backend: GET /api/cases/{id}/analysis returns stage=4, status=complete, cross_reviews with 4 keys (prosecution/defense/legal_scholar/bias_detector). legal_scholar and bias_detector have full fields (cross_review_summary, challenges, agreements, key_insight, revised_position). prosecution and defense had LLM transient errors - shown gracefully as error summaries. chief_justice.synthesis includes cross_review_impact field. Frontend: data-testid=cross-review-section FOUND, all 4 cross-review-card-{member} FOUND, cross_review_impact visible in CJ card, Stage 2 header 'Stage 2 — Cross-Review Deliberation' visible, stage progress bar shows Stage 4 of 4: Complete (100%).
